    <filterFormula>OR(

                AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.ApprovalStatus}, "Approved"),

rag_chunks.description:
XML element 'Flow' structure and usage in Salesforce Flow metadata.
MUST contain these child elements: apiVersion, areMetricsLoggedToDataCloud, environments, interviewLabel, label, processType, start, status.
MAY also contain: loops, processMetadataValues, recordLookups, sourceTemplate, subflows, variables, actionCalls, assignments.
CORRECT child element order (CRITICAL): apiVersion -> areMetricsLoggedToDataCloud -> environments -> interviewLabel -> label -> loops -> processMetadataValues -> processMetadataValues -> processType -> recordLookups -> sourceTemplate -> start -> status -> subflows -> variables -> variables -> variables. Elements placed in wrong order will cause deployment errors.
XML EXAMPLE:
<Flow>
    <apiVersion>65.0</apiVersion>
    <areMetricsLoggedToDataCloud>false</areMetricsLoggedToDataCloud>
    <environments>Default</environments>
    <interviewLabel>Incident_Close_Trigger1 {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}</interviewLabel>
    <label>Incident_Close_Trigger1</label>
    <loops>
        <name>Get_Swarm</name>
        <label>Get Swarm</label>
        <locationX>0</locationX>
        <locationY>0</locationY>
        <collectionReference>Get_Swarm_Records</collectionReference>
        <iterationOrder>Asc</iterationOrder>
        <nextValueConnector>
            <targetReference>Close_Selected_Swarm</targetReference>
        </nextValueConnector>
    </loops>
    <processMetadataValues>
        <name>BuilderType</name>
        <value>
            <stringValue>LightningFlowBuilder</stringValue>
        </value>
    </processMetadataValues>
    <processMetadataValues>
        <name>CanvasMode</name>
        <value>
            <stringValue>AUTO_LAYOUT_CANVAS</stringValue>
        </value>
    </processMetadataValues>
    <processType>AutoLaunchedFlow</processType>
    <recordLookups>
        <name>Get_Swarm_Records</name>
        <label>Get Swarm Records</label>
        <locationX>0</locationX>
        <locationY>0</locationY>
        <assignNullValuesIfNoRecordsFound>false</assignNullValuesIfNoRecordsFound>
        <connector>
            <targetReference>Get_Swarm</targetReference>
        </connector>
        <filterLogic>and</filterLogic>
        <filters>
            <field>RelatedRecordId</field>
            <operator>EqualTo</operator>
            <value>
                <elementReference>$Record.Id</elementReference>

XML element 'rules' structure and usage in Salesforce Flow metadata.
Defines a branch outcome inside a decisions element. Contains conditionLogic and conditions.
MUST contain these child elements: name, conditionLogic, label.
MAY also contain: conditions, connector.
CORRECT child element order (CRITICAL): name -> conditionLogic -> conditions -> conditions -> connector -> label. Elements placed in wrong order will cause deployment errors.
Appears inside: decisions.
XML EXAMPLE:
<rules>
    <name>HasAllTimeSheets</name>
    <conditionLogic>and</conditionLogic>
    <conditions>
        <leftValueReference>GetAllTimeSheets</leftValueReference>
        <operator>IsNull</operator>
        <rightValue>
            <booleanValue>false</booleanValue>
        </rightValue>
    </conditions>
    <conditions>
        <leftValueReference>GetAllTimeSheets</leftValueReference>
        <operator>IsEmpty</operator>
        <rightValue>
            <booleanValue>false</booleanValue>
        </rightValue>
    </conditions>
    <connector>
        <targetReference>IterateOverAllTimeSheets</targetReference>
    </connector>
    <label>Yes</label>
</rules>
